requirement_topic.en: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 Safety Evidence — IANORQ Conformity and Angola Project Acceptance
requirement_topic.zh: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2安全证据——IANORQ合格评定及安哥拉项目接受
requirement_topic.zht: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2安全證據——IANORQ合格評定及安哥拉項目接受

summary.en: IANORQ is Angola's standards and quality body and is the primary standards/conformity reference point for imported regulated products. For PV inverters, the practical safety baseline in Angola projects is IEC 62109-1 and IEC 62109-2 type-test evidence, because these are the internationally recognized safety standards for power converters used in photovoltaic systems. Large Angola PV projects and rural electrification procurements may also require IEC safety evidence directly in EPC or lender specifications. Safety evidence should cover the exact model or model family, DC voltage class, AC output configuration, enclosure rating, thermal limits, protective earthing, isolation, and firmware or hardware variants supplied to Angola.
summary.zh: IANORQ是安哥拉标准和质量机构，是进口受监管产品的主要标准/合格评定参考点。对于光伏逆变器，安哥拉项目的实际安全基准是IEC 62109-1和IEC 62109-2型式试验证据，因为这些是光伏系统功率变换器的国际公认安全标准。安哥拉大型光伏项目和农村电气化采购也可能在EPC或贷款方规格中直接要求IEC安全证据。安全证据应覆盖供应至安哥拉的确切型号或型号系列、直流电压等级、交流输出配置、外壳等级、热限值、保护接地、隔离以及固件或硬件变体。
summary.zht: IANORQ是安哥拉標準和品質機構，是進口受監管產品的主要標準/合格評定參考點。對於光伏逆變器，安哥拉項目的實際安全基準是IEC 62109-1和IEC 62109-2型式試驗證據，因為這些是光伏系統功率轉換器的國際公認安全標準。安哥拉大型光伏項目和農村電氣化採購也可能在EPC或貸款方規格中直接要求IEC安全證據。安全證據應覆蓋供應至安哥拉的確切型號或型號系列、直流電壓等級、交流輸出配置、外殼等級、熱限值、保護接地、隔離以及韌體或硬體變體。

standards_or_laws: IANORQ standards and conformity role for Angola
IEC 62109-1 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 1: General requirements
IEC 62109-2 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 2: Particular requirements for inverters
EPC / lender project specifications for Angola utility-scale and rural electrification PV projects

summary.en: China-side PV inverter safety evidence commonly includes GB/T 37408, NB/T 32004, CQC/CGC voluntary certificates, and CNAS laboratory reports. These documents may demonstrate domestic testing maturity but are not a substitute for IEC 62109-1/-2 certificates unless the Angola conformity route, project owner, and EPC/lender reviewer explicitly accept the mapping. China reports should be checked for model-family coverage, component critical list, insulation system, environmental rating, and whether the tested configuration matches the Angola bill of materials.
summary.zh: 中国侧光伏逆变器安全证据通常包括GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004、CQC/CGC自愿证书及CNAS实验室报告。这些文件可展示国内测试成熟度，但除非安哥拉合格评定路径、项目业主及EPC/贷款方审查方明确接受映射，否则不能替代IEC 62109-1/-2证书。应检查中国报告的型号系列覆盖、关键元件清单、绝缘系统、环境等级以及测试配置是否与安哥拉物料清单一致。
summary.zht: 中國側光伏逆變器安全證據通常包括GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004、CQC/CGC自願證書及CNAS實驗室報告。這些文件可展示國內測試成熟度，但除非安哥拉合格評定路徑、項目業主及EPC/貸款方審查方明確接受映射，否則不能替代IEC 62109-1/-2證書。應檢查中國報告的型號系列覆蓋、關鍵元件清單、絕緣系統、環境等級以及測試配置是否與安哥拉物料清單一致。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
NB/T 32004-2018 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)

gap.en: Gap: A China-only safety certificate does not close the Angola safety acceptance gate. Exporters should prepare IEC 62109-1/-2 type-test certificates, test reports, critical component lists, rating labels, installation manual, Portuguese-language safety warnings, declaration of conformity or manufacturer declaration requested by the importer, and traceability from certificate model numbers to shipped model numbers. Where IANORQ or an Angola project reviewer accepts an IEC CB route, keep the CB certificate, CB test report, national deviations review if any, and factory inspection evidence together.
gap.zh: 差距：仅中国安全证书不能关闭安哥拉安全接受门槛。出口商应准备IEC 62109-1/-2型式试验证书、测试报告、关键元件清单、额定标签、安装手册、葡萄牙语安全警示、进口商要求的合格声明或制造商声明，以及证书型号与出货型号之间的可追溯关系。若IANORQ或安哥拉项目审查方接受IEC CB路径，应同时保存CB证书、CB测试报告、适用时的国家差异审查及工厂检查证据。
gap.zht: 差距：僅中國安全證書不能關閉安哥拉安全接受門檻。出口商應準備IEC 62109-1/-2型式試驗證書、測試報告、關鍵元件清單、額定標籤、安裝手冊、葡萄牙語安全警示、進口商要求的合格聲明或製造商聲明，以及證書型號與出貨型號之間的可追溯關係。若IANORQ或安哥拉項目審查方接受IEC CB路徑，應同時保存CB證書、CB測試報告、適用時的國家差異審查及工廠檢查證據。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where required by IANORQ conformity/import review, project technical specification, EPC submittal review, lender procurement condition, or owner engineer
mandatory_status.cn: Voluntary or project-driven in China; China domestic certificates do not automatically satisfy Angola IEC 62109 evidence expectations

source.publisher: IANORQ (Instituto Angolano de Normalização e Qualidade)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A PV inverter supported only by China GB/T 37408 or NB/T 32004 safety evidence should not be treated as ready for Angola. Prepare IEC 62109-1/-2 certificates and reports, Portuguese-language safety documentation, and model traceability, then confirm the accepted conformity route with IANORQ, the importer, the EPC contractor, or the owner engineer before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 仅有中国GB/T 37408或NB/T 32004安全证据的光伏逆变器，不应被视为已准备好进入安哥拉。应准备IEC 62109-1/-2证书和报告、葡萄牙语安全文件及型号可追溯性，并在出货前向IANORQ、进口商、EPC承包商或业主工程师确认可接受的合格评定路径。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 僅有中國GB/T 37408或NB/T 32004安全證據的光伏逆變器，不應被視為已準備好進入安哥拉。應準備IEC 62109-1/-2證書和報告、葡萄牙語安全文件及型號可追溯性，並在出貨前向IANORQ、進口商、EPC承包商或業主工程師確認可接受的合格評定路徑。
